ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crafters" (
  "crafter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafter */,
  "crafter_name" TEXT /* Name of the crafter */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the crafter (e.g., blacksmith, alchemist) */,
  "experience_level" INTEGER /* Experience level of the crafter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crafter */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the crafter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crafter in the game world */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the crafter logged into the system */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of crafting sessions the crafter has participated in */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the crafter based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafters_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Crafter, Supervisor, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., Ingot (Bronze), Flask of Oil) */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., Metal, Liquid, Gem) */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the material (e.g., piece, liter) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the material (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the material */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the material's stock was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "craft_points" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the crafting activity */,
  "craft_points_required" INTEGER /* Craft points required for the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crafting activity */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of skills required to perform the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., Repair Kit, Assembly Template) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Tool, Template) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the item in game currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the item was last updated */,
  "is_retired" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the item is no longer in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting recipe */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being crafted */,
  "craft_points_required" INTEGER /* Craft points required to craft the item */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafting activity */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the recipe is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_recipes_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES craft_points ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_recipes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_materials" (
  "recipe_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe material */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafting recipe */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material required */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the material requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the material requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the material requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_materials_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES crafting_recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting session */,
  "crafter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafter */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafting recipe */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the crafting session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the crafting session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the crafting session (e.g., started, completed, failed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "craft_points_spent" INTEGER /* Total craft points spent during the session */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* List of materials used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_sessions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES crafting_recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_sessions_crafter_id FOREIGN KEY ("crafter_id") REFERENCES crafters ("crafter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafted_items" (
  "crafted_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafted item */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafting session */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item crafted */,
  "quantity_crafted" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item crafted */,
  "craft_date" TEXT /* Date the item was crafted */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the crafted item (e.g., poor, fair, good, excellent) */,
  "craft_points_spent" INTEGER /* Craft points spent on the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafted_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafted_items_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES crafting_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafted_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material (if applicable) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item (if applicable) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "threshold_alert" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert should be sent when the stock reaches a certain level */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last audited */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template (e.g., Basic, Simple, Standard) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the template in game currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the template was last updated */,
  "is_retired" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the template is no longer in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_materials" (
  "template_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template material */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly template */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material required */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the material requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the material requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the material requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_materials_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES assembly_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly template used */,
  "crafter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafter who created the assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date the assembly was created */,
  "assembly_status" TEXT /* Status of the assembly (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the assembly was created */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the assembled item (e.g., poor, fair, good, excellent) */,
  "craft_points_spent" INTEGER /* Craft points spent on the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assemblies_crafter_id FOREIGN KEY ("crafter_id") REFERENCES crafters ("crafter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assemblies_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES assembly_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_materials" (
  "assembly_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly material */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the material usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the material usage was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the material usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_materials_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly log */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note for the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_logs_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)
